intro.description: A bachelor's thesis reference app that implements the same dashboard three times — once per library — to compare performance, accessibility, developer experience, ecosystem, and theming.

mui.name: MUI v7
mui.description: Material Design components with a rich ecosystem and strong TypeScript support.

antd.name: Ant Design v5
antd.description: Enterprise-grade component suite with comprehensive built-ins and documentation.

chakra.name: Chakra UI v3
chakra.description: Composable, accessibility-first primitives with flexible prop-based styling.

performance.label: Performance
performance.description: Core Web Vitals, Lighthouse scores, bundle size.

accessibility.label: Accessibility
accessibility.description: WCAG 2.1 AA compliance, automated axe audit, NVDA screen reader testing.

dx.label: Developer Experience
dx.description: API ergonomics, TypeScript support, documentation quality.

ecosystem.label: Ecosystem
ecosystem.description: Community size, third-party integrations, release cadence.
